positive: An intricate, symmetrical, and highly stylized pattern featuring whimsical geometric flora and fauna. The design should center around a large, stylized mandala-like core that radiates outward. Elements include interconnected celestial bodies, abstract hummingbirds mid-flight, stylized geometric flowers (like mandalas), and repeating jungle vine motifs. The color palette is limited to three contrasting, jewel-toned colors (deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and metallic gold/ochre) against a crisp off-white background. The style should blend Art Deco elegance with psychedelic symmetry, creating clean silhouettes and strong contrast suitable for repeat tiling. High detail, vector illustration quality, clean lines, flat graphic design, maximalist composition, excellent negative space management.
negative: blurry, noisy, grain, text, watermark, signature, copyright, logo, artifacts, extra limbs, deformed, malformed, jpeg artifacts, low detail, realistic photograph
